problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
mechanism: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating
hypothesis: If Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating is applied to low, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
